arabic:
عن ابن مسعود رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا تباشر المرأة المرأة، فتصفها لزوجها كأنه ينظر إليها‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Ibn Mas'ud (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "No woman should touch another woman's body and then describe the details of her figure to her husband in such a manner as if he was looking at her.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
